notes: Scope ambiguity = same wording, different quantifier nesting (def:q-alt) or connective scope (def:quantifier-scope). Both load-bearing. Note this node correctly uses def:quantifier-scope (0019, the translation-oriented scope node, whose gloss is about translation errors) rather than def:scope (0075, the formal syntactic one) -- evidence the two 'scope' nodes serve different sections and may be intentional rather than pure duplicates.
